_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
这是一个大型重构任务。

正在分析文件夹重命名方案。仓库根目录已是 JellybeansPicUploader，需要确定 PicX-WPF 子文件夹的最终名称，并同步修改项目内的 PicX 标识。

发现 PicX-WPF 子文件夹与仓库根目录同名冲突，考虑扁平化结构或重新规划目录层级。

已确认 PicX-WPF 子文件夹与仓库根目录同名会导致嵌套冲突。决定将 PicX-WPF 重命名为 JellybeansPicUploader，同时把 PicX.Wpf 项目也同步改为 JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf。

意识到 PicX-WPF 直接重命名为 JellybeansPicUploader 会在仓库根目录下产生重复嵌套。正在考虑将子文件夹改为 wpf 或直接合并到根目录，以避免目录层级冗余。

已确定采用嵌套目录方案：PicX-WPF 将重命名为 JellybeansPicUploader，PicX.Wpf 项目同步改为 JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf。虽然会产生与仓库根目录同名的嵌套层级，但会严格按用户要求执行。

正在梳理项目内部所有需要同步修改的标识符。

命名空间将从 PicXWpf 改为 JellybeansPicUploader。GitHub 常量类名改为 JellybeansPicUploaderGitHubConstants。程序集名称和产品字符串统一为 JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf。界面中的用户可见标题也会替换为 JellybeansPicUploader。

关于原始 PicX 网页和上游项目 OAuth 的相关注释，这些属于兼容性说明，将保留原意不变。

正在区分项目内部品牌与外部 OAuth 兼容性引用。项目内 PicX 品牌将全部替换为 JellybeansPicUploader，但外部 PicX GitHub App 的 OAuth 客户端兼容性注释会保留原意不变。</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
准备分阶段执行重命名。

先用 PowerShell 重命名目录，再批量替换源文件中的 PicX。注意到仓库根目录已是 JellybeansPicUploader，直接将 PicX-WPF 改为同名会导致嵌套，但用户明确要求此名称，因此接受该结构。

已确定具体重命名步骤：先用 git mv 将 PicX-WPF 目录及内部的 PicX.Wpf 项目、slnx 解决方案、csproj 文件和 PicXGitHubConstants.cs 移至 JellybeansPicUploader 下；随后在源文件中批量替换 PicXWpf、PicXGitHubConstants、PicX-WPF 和 PicX.Wpf 等标识符。

正在细化替换顺序。PicXGitHubConstants 需优先替换，避免与 PicX 冲突；其余 PicX 标识按 PicXWpf、PicX-WPF、PicX.Wpf 的顺序依次替换；最后处理剩余 PicX，但需注意保留 URL 中的 picx 字符串。Company 和 Product 文本中的 PicX 也将同步改为 JellyBeans 或 Jellybeans。</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

正在系统性地重命名目录、项目文件及代码中的引用。


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd "d:\JellyBeans\JellybeansPicUploader\JellybeansPicUploader"
$extensions = @('*.cs','*.xaml','*.csproj','*.slnx','*.pubxml','*.ps1','*.manifest')
$files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include $extensions | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\(build-check|build-check\d|dist)\\' }
foreach ($file in $files) {
  $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file.FullName)
  $original = $content
  $content = $content -replace 'PicXGitHubConstants','JellybeansPicUploaderGitHubConstants'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicXWpf','JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX-WPF','JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX\.Wpf','JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf'
  $content = $content -replace '<Company>PicX</Company>','<Company>JellyBeans</Company>'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 桌面图床','JellybeansPicUploader 桌面图床'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 快捷上传','JellybeansPicUploader 快捷上传'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 上传状态','JellybeansPicUploader 上传状态'
  $content = $content -replace '"PicX"','"JellybeansPicUploader"'
  $content = $content -replace 'by PicX-WPF','by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Upload images by PicX-WPF','Upload images by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete image by PicX-WPF','Delete image by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete images by PicX-WPF','Delete images by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Upload by PicX-WPF','Upload by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete by PicX-WPF','Delete by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Batch operation by PicX-WPF','Batch operation by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Init repo via PicX-WPF','Init repo via JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX images hosting repository','JellybeansPicUploader images hosting repository'
  $content = $content -replace '# Welcome to use PicX','# Welcome to use JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace '\[PicX\]\(https://github.com/XPoet/picx\)','[JellybeansPicUploader](https://github.com/JellyBeans/JellybeansPicUploader)'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX is a simple','JellybeansPicUploader is a simple'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX is completely open source','JellybeansPicUploader is completely open source'
  $content = $content -replace '网页端 PicX','网页端图床'
  $content = $content -replace '与 PicX 使用相同','与上游 GitHub App 使用相同'
  $content = $content -replace '必须与 PicX GitHub App','必须与 GitHub App'
  $content = $content -replace '如 PicX 网页 dev','如本地 OAuth 回调 dev'
  $content = $content -replace '返回 PicX-WPF 桌面客户端','返回 JellybeansPicUploader 桌面客户端'
  $content = $content -replace '避免 PicX\.Wpf 与 Wpf\.Ui','避免 JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf 与 Wpf.Ui'
  if ($content -ne $original) {
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file.FullName, $content, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  }
}
Write-Host "Updated $($files.Count) files scanned"</summary>

```bash
cd "d:\JellyBeans\JellybeansPicUploader\JellybeansPicUploader"
$extensions = @('*.cs','*.xaml','*.csproj','*.slnx','*.pubxml','*.ps1','*.manifest')
$files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include $extensions | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\(build-check|build-check\d|dist)\\' }
foreach ($file in $files) {
  $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file.FullName)
  $original = $content
  $content = $content -replace 'PicXGitHubConstants','JellybeansPicUploaderGitHubConstants'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicXWpf','JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX-WPF','JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX\.Wpf','JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf'
  $content = $content -replace '<Company>PicX</Company>','<Company>JellyBeans</Company>'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 桌面图床','JellybeansPicUploader 桌面图床'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 快捷上传','JellybeansPicUploader 快捷上传'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX 上传状态','JellybeansPicUploader 上传状态'
  $content = $content -replace '"PicX"','"JellybeansPicUploader"'
  $content = $content -replace 'by PicX-WPF','by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Upload images by PicX-WPF','Upload images by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete image by PicX-WPF','Delete image by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete images by PicX-WPF','Delete images by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Upload by PicX-WPF','Upload by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Delete by PicX-WPF','Delete by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Batch operation by PicX-WPF','Batch operation by JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'Init repo via PicX-WPF','Init repo via JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX images hosting repository','JellybeansPicUploader images hosting repository'
  $content = $content -replace '# Welcome to use PicX','# Welcome to use JellybeansPicUploader'
  $content = $content -replace '\[PicX\]\(https://github.com/XPoet/picx\)','[JellybeansPicUploader](https://github.com/JellyBeans/JellybeansPicUploader)'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX is a simple','JellybeansPicUploader is a simple'
  $content = $content -replace 'PicX is completely open source','JellybeansPicUploader is completely open source'
  $content = $content -replace '网页端 PicX','网页端图床'
  $content = $content -replace '与 PicX 使用相同','与上游 GitHub App 使用相同'
  $content = $content -replace '必须与 PicX GitHub App','必须与 GitHub App'
  $content = $content -replace '如 PicX 网页 dev','如本地 OAuth 回调 dev'
  $content = $content -replace '返回 PicX-WPF 桌面客户端','返回 JellybeansPicUploader 桌面客户端'
  $content = $content -replace '避免 PicX\.Wpf 与 Wpf\.Ui','避免 JellybeansPicUploader.Wpf 与 Wpf.Ui'
  if ($content -ne $original) {
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file.FullName, $content, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  }
}
Write-Host "Updated $($files.Count) files scanned"
```
